feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Adding new item to an existing PO failing with I_PUCHASEORDERTP_2 in S/4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement where i have to add new items with cost center to an existing PO. I am using below code. 
NOTE : ls_po_num-purchaseorderbycustomer has PO number that i want to update.
              ls_po_item-accountassignmentnumber has the last acc asst number.
              GL Account is fetched automatically by the system in the backend.

  DATA(lv_acc_no) = ls_po_item-accountassignmentnumber.
    LOOP AT lt_vbap_temp ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_vbap>).
      lv_acc_no = lv_acc_no + 1.
      DATA(lv_cid)  = |{ cv_itmcid }{ lv_acc_no }|.
      DATA(lv_cid1) = |{ cv_itmacc }{ lv_acc_no }|.

      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_purchase_order_item ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_poi>).

      <ls_poi>-%tky-purchaseorder = ls_po_num-purchaseorderbycustomer.
      <ls_poi>-%target = VALUE #( BASE <ls_poi>-%target ( %cid = lv_cid
                                 material                  = <ls_vbap>-material
                                 plant                     = <ls_vbap>-plant
                                 orderquantity             = <ls_vbap>-ordqty
                                 purchaseorderquantityunit = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderquantityunit
                                 purchaseorderitem         = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderitem
                                 netpriceamount            = <ls_vbap>-netpriceamount
                                 documentcurrency          = <ls_vbap>-documentcurrency
                                 accountassignmentcategory = <ls_vbap>-accassigncat

                                 %control = VALUE #( material = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     plant = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     orderquantity = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     purchaseorderquantityunit = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     purchaseorderitem = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     netpriceamount = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     documentcurrency = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                     accountassignmentcategory = if_abap_behv=>mk-on )
                                   ) ).

      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_po_acc_assign ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_acc>).
      <ls_acc>-%cid_ref = lv_cid.
      <ls_acc>-%tky-PurchaseOrder = ls_po_num-purchaseorderbycustomer.
      <ls_acc>-%tky-purchaseorderitem = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderitem.
      <ls_acc>-%target = VALUE #( BASE <ls_acc>-%target ( %cid = lv_cid1
                                                          purchaseorderitem = <ls_vbap>-purchaseorderitem
                                                          accountassignmentnumber = lv_acc_no
                                                          costcenter = <ls_vbap>-costcenter
                                                          wbselementexternalid = <ls_vbap>-wbselement
                                                          "GLAccount = <ls_vbap>-glaccount

                                      %control = VALUE #( purchaseorderitem = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          accountassignmentnumber = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          costcenter = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          glaccount = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                                                          wbselementexternalid = if_abap_behv=>mk-on )
                                   ) ).


    ENDLOOP.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_purchaseordertp_2
        ENTITY PurchaseOrder
        CREATE BY \_purchaseorderitem FROM lt_purchase_order_item
        ENTITY purchaseorderitem
        CREATE BY \_purordaccountassignment FROM lt_po_acc_assign
        REPORTED FINAL(ls_reported)
        FAILED FINAL(ls_failed)
        MAPPED FINAL(ls_mapped).

    IF ls_failed-purchaseorder IS NOT INITIAL.
      LOOP AT ls_reported-purchaseorder ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_reported_po>).
        RAISE SHORTDUMP TYPE zcx_bc_message_wrapper
          USING MESSAGE.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.

While using this code i am continuously getting error " Numbering of child object does not match parent object (&1)." in ls_reported, only for PurchaseOrderItem - item 00030.

How can i solve this error.

BR.
Tushar

entry.title: AI Search for Archived SAP KBAs: Integrating ABAP with Azure AI Search
entry.content:
Leaving SAP maintenance support does not mean losing SAP knowledge — but it does mean losing tools customers were used to.

The journey with an alternative support provider typically begins with a custom archive created from SAP software and KBA notes downloaded from the SAP Support Portal before the support contract expires. 

While this archive contains valuable corrections and documentation, access to the content becomes the customer's exclusive responsibility. Only the customer is authorized to interact with the archived material as he has the right to download and keep the copy of SAP software (according to the license terms).

For many "former" SAP support customers, this creates a long-standing challenge as such content might hardly be utilized to its full without an appropriate toolkit.

Trivial tasks like implementing a single note with prerequisites can become unexpectedly complex. In addition, most modern search engines work best with standard document formats, while a significant portion of SAP knowledge is distributed in the proprietary format zipped and packed in the .SAR file.

As a result, customers often rely on simple text extracted from .txt or .pdf files which are downloaded from the SAP Support Portal and indexed using conventional search engines.
Unfortunately, these stripped-down versions lose formatting, embedded images and other contextual information that can be crucial for determining whether a KBA is relevant and lead to solving potential SAP bug or an issue.

The result is a degraded search experience where important insights may remain hidden simply because the original structure of the document is lost.

This "workaround" has many limitations. Yet for many "former" SAP support customers it gradually becomes a new norm — learning to live with compromises.

I decided to challenge this assumption.

Instead of accepting the workaround, I set out to turn it into a proper solution and establish a new "best practice" for searching of SAP KBA in customers' archives.

The result is a solution I call SAP Archive AI Search.

1. The system leverages Microsoft Azure AI Search as the backend search engine responsible for indexing and retrieving archived content.
2. As a middleware layer I used the ABAP SDK for Azure, which I extended to support Microsoft Azure AI Search APIs.
3. Finally, a custom ABAP client provides a seamless user experience inside SAP GUI, allowing users to submit queries, navigate results, and integrate directly with other Azure services such as Blob Storage for convenient access to archived files stored in the customer’s cloud environment.

Solution is infrastructure-less, you do not need to host and run search engine on your own, distributing indexed content across the users (clients) or even use 3rd party tools to attach your cloud storage to navigate and access the content from local machines.

Only thing you need is to search for the content, read and download whatever you need straight from your SAP Gui. 

Key capabilities.

  • Unified search experience across multiple archive sources (.SAR, .TXT, .PDF)

  • United rendering using SAP GUI HTML browser controls

  • Structured index following the SAP KBA layout (Label, Symptom, Reason, Solution, etc.) allowing to address each field/section with separate set of conditions for complex query scenarios

  • Preservation of the rich formatting contained in .SAR archives including additional technical information

  • Correction instruction, enabling delta-code navigation and where-used exploration

  • Validity search, scopes your search query based on application stack of your system

  • Faceted navigation, paging, and direct reference navigation for notes present in the archive

  • Relevance scoring, including term boosting and scoring profiles dramatically improves accuracy to your search conditions

  • Full support for Azure AI Search query syntax, enabling advanced scenarios such as:

    • searching thousands of notes in a single query

    • fielded search

    • proximity, fuzzy, and regular expression queries

    • grouped queries

  • Metadata search across indexed archive attributes

Examples:

  1. Simple search retrieves all matching records per your query highlighting all found terms/tokens 

     

  2.  List overview with direct navigation to correction instruction, attachments for download and additional metadata information


  3. Use multiple conditions to search relevant notes containing DB6 in the title related to tracing using negative search list per Component field and term boosting "unix" to rank matching records containing this term on top.
  4. Search within the "delta code" of your corrections and restrict the scope per remote application stack making sure you only look for what possibly can be implemented


  5. Use expert mode to search for multiple notes in the archive and return only titles for matching records


  6. Use advance techniques like regular expression, proximity and fuzzy search whenever you need it

     



    Note: search terms in maximum proximity of two tokens apart

  7. Direct reference note navigation for the KBA articles shifts the context of your original query, however you can still navigate back using return button (vertical navigation)

    Note: Reference navigation works only for the notes which exists in your archive. 

  8. Blob search mode, allows to search and navigate based on your metadata extracted out of your blob files

 

The goal of this project was simple: restore a powerful search experience for archived SAP knowledge for customers under the 3rd party support providers.

By combining ABAP development with modern cloud search capabilities, it becomes possible to turn static SAP archives into a fully searchable knowledge system again.

I hope this approach can inspire other developers facing similar challenges which may arise along your alternative support provider.

Would like to have such solution implemented in your SAP environment?  Feel free to contact me and I will share the access to the GitHub repositories.

entry.title: Message type SHPCON for outbound delivery change which has no picking process need to do batch split
entry.content:
Hi I'm using Basic type DELVRY03 and Message type SHPCON . Doing Outbound Delivery change which has no picking and packing process. Because sales order Outbound delivery. Need to do Batch Split while inbound idoc.
Currently i use E1EDL18 CHG BUT IT UPDATING ONLY THE HEADER DATA.
Batch split is not working but manually i can able to do batch split.

entry.title: Updating Production Order Component Quantity as per Batch from Custom App to SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working with Custom Application (using RAP Application) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, where Batch wise line items are created with fields such as Batch, Quantity, Unit of measurement , Plant, Material, Storage Location, Backflush Indicator, Material Category, & Sequence Category.

Our requirement is to update these line items in the Component tab of the Production Order in the standard SAP Public Cloud system.

In other words, each Batch wise line item created in the Custom Application should get populated in a corresponding component tab in the Production Order.

We explored the CDS view I_ProductionOrderOpComponentTP, but as it is not a root view, we are unable to perform transactional updates using EML (Entity Manipulation Language) for transactional updates.

Below is the field mapping for reference

 

CDS View FieldCustom App Field
RequiredQuantityQuantity
BaseUnitUOM
BatchBatch
PlantPlant
MaterialProduct
BillOfMaterialItemNumberLine Item Number
StorageLocationMRM1'
MatlCompIsMarkedForBackflush'X'
BillOfMaterialItemCategoryL'
SequenceCategory                          '0'


We would like to know if there is any available BAdI, API, or transactional CDS view that can be used to achieve this requirement.

Best Regards,

Thank you.

entry.title: Flexible ABAP - a new JetBrains plugin for ABAP, CDS, and BDEF
entry.content:
Hey everybody,

I just launched a new JetBrains plugin: "Flexible ABAP". It works for all JetBrains IDEs (IntelliJ, PyCharm, WebStorm, CLion etc) and you can find it on the Marketplace by searching "Flexible ABAP" (happy if someone wants to link it, I never know the etiquette on these forums).

Here's a quick few screenshots:

 

 

 

 

 

My own ABAP days date back to the early 2000s, when I got to work on some Fraport machines. I loved the language. Now, years later, I wanted to get back into it (and rerun some projects of mine) and looked for IDE integrations. I noticed that the only one I could find was still for Eclipse. I do language implementations for fun in my spare time, so I figured I may have something to contribute to the community.

Anyway, since neither the ABAP language spec nor existing grammar implementations were publicly available, I had to recreate the whole thing from scratch. Full BNF grammar for ABAP, BDEF and CDS views. It was a lot of work but also the kind of thing I find weirdly enjoyable. The benefit of having done this is that now I can do pretty great things in the IDE - refactoring, on-hover documentation, auto-complete, code validation, structured views etc all came in pretty quickly.

Even though it is new, I tried to ship with a useful set of features out of the gate: autocomplete for all three languages, hover docs with SAP Help links, various live templates (they make it faster to write snippets),  postfix templates, structure view, code inspections with quick fixes, and proper themes for all three languages. I also added ways for you to install the sdk or start run/debug sessions. The foundation is there.

With your help, I now want to turn it into a really great environment for ABAP developers. I'm really early though and since the grammar was built without a spec to lean on, your feedback matters more than usual. What works, what breaks, what I got wrong. I'm happy to hand out free voucher codes for a trial month to anyone who wants to give it a go and share their experience. Just reply here or reach out on GitHub and I'll send one over.

On pricing: free for open source projects and students, 50% off for non-profits and startups. But if none of that applies, just reach out anyway. Right now I care about getting this right more than anything else.

 

Would love to hear your thoughts!

Cheers, Paul

entry.title: CDS View Value help is broken
entry.content:
I have a CDS-View for value help which provides the following:

KeyValue
A10
B60
A60

 

When I use this view in my other view, with "_parent" being an "association to parent"

      @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition:
        [{
          entity: {
            name   : 'ZVH_KV',
            element: 'Value'
          },
          additionalBinding: [{
            element: 'Key',
            localElement: '_parent.Key',
            usage: #FILTER_AND_RESULT
          }]
        }]

I get the following output:

 

KeyValue
A10
B60
A60

Notice, how the output is in fact not filtered! What must I change for the output to get filtered? It works with "localConstant" which I don't want to use. Is this a bug?

entry.title: ME21N Enhancement - Disable/Grey Out Custom Subscreen Field Based on PO Document Type
entry.content:
Need help in an enhancement in ME21N / ME22N / ME23N using BAdI ME_GUI_PO_CUST and need guidance on controlling UI behavior dynamically.

Current Setup ---

A custom field (ZZ_ASSET_NO) has been added at PO Header level (EKKO) using CI include (CI_EKKODB)

A custom subscreen has been developed and integrated into the PO Header (Additional Data tab) via BAdI ME_GUI_PO_CUST

The field is displayed and working correctly across: ME21N / ME22N / ME23N

Requirement ---

The requirement is to control the field behavior based on PO Document Type (BSART):

For specific document types (e.g., NB, ZEUP)
Field should be editable

For all other document types
Field should be disabled (greyed out) or optionally hidden

This behavior should be consistent across all three transactions (ME21N / ME22N / ME23N).


Any suggestions, best practices, or references on how this can be achieved would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: How to implement Draft-like staging or caching for Custom Entities with large datasets?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community experts,

I am currently working with a Custom Entity where the data is retrieved through complex custom logic (custom handler). When dealing with large datasets and implementing pagination ($top/$skip), I’ve noticed a performance issue: the custom logic triggers repeatedly for every page request.

Is there a way to implement a Draft Mode or a similar staging/caching mechanism for Custom Entities?

My goal is to:

  1. Execute the full custom logic only once.

  2. Temporarily persist or cache the result set (similar to how Draft tables work).

  3. Allow subsequent pagination requests to fetch data directly from this "draft" or cache instead of re-running the entire logic.

Are there any best practices or built-in features in CAP/RAP to handle this scenario effectively?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: ABAP Trial Booster completes but no ABAP role collections created, cannot connect Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have an SAP BTP Trial account (Global Account: 157530f6trial, Region: US East VA - AWS us10).

Issue: I ran the "Prepare an Account for ABAP Trial" Booster on a completely fresh subaccount. The Booster completes and shows success message "Your subaccount is ready for ABAP Development" and I can download a service key. However:

1. No ABAP role collections are created in Security > Role Collections
2. The ABAP Application Identifier does not appear in XSUAA roles
3. When connecting Eclipse ADT using the downloaded service key I get: "You were successfully authenticated, but an error occurred during the Service Instance logon. Please ensure that your user has the appropriate roles."

What I have tried:
- Deleted and recreated subaccounts multiple times
- Ran the Booster on fresh subaccounts
- Manually created ABAP instance before running Booster
- Checked Entitlements — ABAP Environment shared plan is assigned

Nothing works. The ABAP role collections never get created automatically.

Can anyone help or does SAP need to fix this on the backend?

Thank you.

entry.title: From IoT student to ABAP Developer — need your roadmap advice!
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community! 👋

I'm a final-year CSE (IoT) engineering student and I've recently discovered my passion for SAP — specifically ABAP development. I've already signed up on SAP Learning Hub and SAP Community, and I'm excited to start my journey!

I would love guidance from experienced ABAP developers and consultants on the following:

1. Where should a complete beginner start with ABAP? (Best first resource or course)
2. What is the ideal learning roadmap — from basics to job-ready level?
3. How should I use the SAP BTP trial system for hands-on practice?
4. Which SAP certification should I target first as a fresher?
5. What kind of small projects can I build to strengthen my resume?
6. Any tips on cracking interviews at companies like TCS, Infosys, or Capgemini for SAP ABAP roles?

A little about me:
- Background: CSE with IoT specialisation
- Goal: Land an SAP ABAP Developer role after graduation
- Current status: SAP Learning Hub approval pending, SAP BTP trial being explored

I am a self-motivated learner and ready to put in the work — I just need the right direction from people who've walked this path.

Any advice, resources, blog links, or learning paths would mean the world to me. Thank you so much in advance! 🙏

#ABAP #SAPCareers #FresherInSAP #SAPBTP #LearningJourney

entry.title: Fill Authorization Group Field while creating BP
entry.content:
Hi All,

While creating a new BP, I have a requirement where I need to auto-populate the Authorization Group field based on the Grouping field as shown below:

My requirement is when the Grouping is selected as REUS.

i.e., if Grouping = REUS → Authorization Group = REUS

I checked for relevant BADIs but couldn’t find a suitable one for this requirement. So, I’m trying to achieve this using BDT events.

I implemented my logic in event DSAVB (via TCode BUPT). Below is my code:

FUNCTION zri_bp_auth_group_fill.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Local Interface:
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------

DATA: ls_but000 TYPE but000.

" Read BP general data from local memory
CALL FUNCTION 'BUP_BUPA_BUT000_GET'
IMPORTING
e_but000 = ls_but000.

IF ls_but000-bu_group = 'REUS'.

AUTHORITY-CHECK OBJECT 'B_BUPA_GRP'
ID 'BEGRU' FIELD 'REUS'
ID 'ACTVT' FIELD '01'.

IF sy-subrc = 0.

ls_but000-augrp = 'REUS'.

" Update the data back to memory
CALL FUNCTION 'BUP_BUPA_BUT000_COLLECT'
EXPORTING
i_subname = 'BUT000'
i_but000 = ls_but000.

ELSE.
MESSAGE e003(ZBP).
RETURN.
ENDIF.

ENDIF.

ENDFUNCTION.

The logic works when Grouping is REUS. But the issue is:

  • However, if I change the Grouping to a different value after selecting REUS, the system still reads it as REUS. Due to this, the Authorization Group field continues to be populated with REUS.
  • It looks like the buffer is not getting updated with the latest screen value when this event is triggered

So my questions are:

 

  • Is DSAVB the correct BDT event for this requirement?
  • At which BDT event can I access the latest updated value of BP Grouping from the screen buffer?
  • Or is there a better approach to handle this requirement?

Any suggestions would be really helpful.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: J4D- S4H- RAP Code Generation - Service Interrupted
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While performing a demo on the RAP Code generation feature in J4D – S4H system, we got the Service Interrupted error after attempting multiple times. Also, kindly let us know how to view logs. 

Attached the screenshot for reference.

Regards,

Sahana

entry.title: new field to post goods receipt fiori tile
entry.content:
Hello,

there is a requirement got to me, to Add a total item amount field in "POST GOODS RECEIPT for purchasing Documents " in the fiori. The total amount should only display for the selected items.

Since i am new to Fiori can i get some help to implement this.

regards, 

krishna

entry.title: adding a ew field in post goods receipt page in fiori
entry.content:
hello,

I have a requirement with me to add a field called total item amount in the post good receipt for purchase documents page in fiori. The catch is the total amount should be only for seletced number of items.

Since i am new to fiori , can anyone help me on implementation of this req.

regards,

krishna

entry.title: error sap note 3694434
entry.content:
Hello,

I am applying SAP Note 3694434 and ran into an error in function module J_1B_NF_IV_MATKL_DETERMINE. The note creates a line that uses the NF_TYPES structure, but this structure is not declared in the function.

I have already opened an incident with SAP, but they were not able to help me.

Has anyone who has already applied this note, or who has a more up-to-date system, been able to check where this structure is declared?

entry.title: Is it possible to expose Custom Fields made from CFL in BAPE_VBAK and BAPE_VBAKX?
entry.content:
I have custom fields for VBAK and VBAP made in CFL. However, it is not shown in BAPE_VBAK/VBAP, therefore, I cannot update its fields using BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE.

Is there a way to expose it without using APPEND?

entry.title: QCM Tables in S4HANA
entry.content:
It has been recommended as per the TPO report by SAP to remove the QCM tables

QCMYYSD0022

QCM/SAPLOM/MEH_

QCMYYLE0035

QCMYYLE0018

QCMYYSD0134

Can we remove these tables directly or we need to check any dependency.

How can we check if there is any dependency to be checked before removing this table.

entry.title: We need to identify all unused custom programs(Z*) in the system that did not run from last 2 years
entry.content: We need to identify all unused custom programs(Z*) in the system that did not run from last 2 years, please advise if that is possible , is any eay to get this?

entry.title: BUT020-ADRNR, KNA1-ADRNR in ADRC not populatting Z append fields
entry.content:
Hi all,

Requirement was that in ADRC we should create a custom Z append to store coordinates that external API returns. 

In include ZXSZARU01 we have a custom FM that call the API and populates y_adrc_struc.

Now when I check ADRC table with ADRNR that I got from BUT020 I see all the fields populated. But, when I check ADRC table with ADRNR from KNA1 ( the 2 ADRNRs are different ), my custom z fields for coordinates are not populated.

I've checked the BADI for BP to Customer conversion, and that did not work.

Anyone knows why ADRC with ADRNR from KNA1 does not have populated values for Z coordinates fields?
